title: Haile Selassie I becomes Emperor of Ethiopia
fact: Haile Selassie I was Emperor of Ethiopia from 1930 to 1974.

title: Victor Emmanuel III of Italy becomes Emperor of Ethiopia
fact: Victor Emmanuel III was King of Italy from 29 July 1900 until his abdication on 9 May 1946.

title: Menilek II becomes Emperor of Ethiopia
fact: Menelik II, baptised as Sahle Maryam, was king of Shewa from 1866 to 1889 and Emperor of Ethiopia from 1889 to his death in 1913.

title: Zewditu I of Ethiopia becomes Empress of Ethiopia
fact: Zewditu was Empress of Ethiopia from 1916 until her death in 1930.

title: Susenyos becomes Emperor of Ethiopia
fact: Susenyos I, also known as Susenyos the Catholic, was Emperor of Ethiopia from 1607 to 1632, and a member of the Solomonic dynasty.

title: Yohannes IV becomes Emperor of Ethiopia
fact: Yohannes IV was Emperor of Ethiopia from 1871 to his death in 1889 at the Battle of Gallabat, and king of Tigray from 1869 to 1871.

title: Tewodros II becomes Emperor of Ethiopia
fact: Tewodros II was Emperor of Ethiopia from 1855 until his death in 1868.

title: Yekuno Amlak becomes Emperor of Ethiopia
fact: Yekuno Amlak ; throne name Tesfa Iyasus was Emperor of Ethiopia, from 1270 to 1285, and the founder of the Solomonic dynasty, which lasted until 1974.

title: Iyasu V becomes Emperor of Ethiopia
fact: Lij Iyasu also known as Iyasu V was the designated Emperor of Ethiopia from 1913 to 1916.

title: Zara Yaqob becomes Emperor of Ethiopia
fact: Zara Yaqob was Emperor of Ethiopia, and a member of the Solomonic dynasty who ruled under the regnal name Constantine I.

title: Fasiladas becomes Emperor of Ethiopia
fact: Fasilides, also known as Fasil, Basilide, or Basilides, was Emperor of Ethiopia from 1632 to his death on 18 October 1667, and a member of the Solomonic dynasty.

title: Lebna Dengel becomes Emperor of Ethiopia
fact: Dawit II, better known by his birth name of Lebna Dengel, and also known by the macaronic name Wanag Segad, was Emperor of Ethiopia from 1508 to 1540, whose political center and palace was in Shewa.

title: Amda Seyon I becomes Emperor of Ethiopia
fact: Amda Seyon I, also known as Amda Tsiyon I, throne name Gebre Mesqel, was Emperor of Ethiopia from 1314 to 1344 and a member of the Solomonic dynasty.

title: Gelawdewos becomes Emperor of Ethiopia
fact: Galawdewos, also known as Claudius in European sources, was Emperor of Ethiopia from 3 September 1540 until his death in 1559, and a member of the Solomonic dynasty.

title: Sarsa Dengel becomes Emperor of Ethiopia
fact: Sarsa Dengel, also known as Sarsa the Great, was Emperor of Ethiopia, and a member of the Solomonic dynasty.

title: Tekle Giyorgis I becomes Emperor of Ethiopia
fact: Tekle Giyorgis I, throne name Feqr Sagad, was Emperor of Ethiopia intermittently between 20 July 1779 and June 1800, and a member of the Solomonic dynasty.

title: Iyasu I becomes Emperor of Ethiopia
fact: Iyasu I, throne name Adyam Sagad, also known as Iyasu the Great, was Emperor of Ethiopia from 19 July 1682 until his death in 1706, and a member of the Solomonic dynasty.

title: Yohannes I becomes Emperor of Ethiopia
fact: Yohannes I, also known as Yohannes the Righteous, throne name A'ilaf Sagad was Emperor of Ethiopia from 1667 to 1682, and a member of the Solomonic dynasty.

title: Menas of Ethiopia becomes Emperor of Ethiopia
fact: Menas or Minas, throne name Admas Sagad I, was Emperor of Ethiopia from 1559 until his death in 1563, and a member of the Solomonic dynasty.
